candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository is no longer maintained, and PRs to add or modify curves should instead be made against [arkworks-rs/algebra](https://github.com/arkworks-rs/algebra); all the curves implemented here have moved to the [`curves` folder](https://github.com/arkworks-rs/algebra/tree/…
